chartizate-text-writer-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a release compatible with Java 11 compilation.
chartizate-text-writer-api/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support the 'release' flag or Java 11 toolchains correctly.

chartizate-text-writer-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 11.
chartizate-text-writer-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in Java 9+; using them with Java 11 can lead to classpath issues or warnings, and 'release' is the standard way to specify the target JDK version.
